proposal_summary: Promote a repeated, validated workflow into an inactive candidate skill.

tests_or_evals: focused eval fixture proving the skill improves the repeated workflow
regression test that fails before the skill or contract exists
success_criteria: proposal stays inactive until tests and review pass
activation policy names scope, budget and stop condition
raw private evidence is not published

budget.stop_condition: validation fails, independent review blocks, or scope expands

tool_governance.supply_chain_review: public safety, secret safety and supply-chain proof before activation

parallel_workflow_guidance: use fan-out only when independent evidence, adversarial review or scale justifies it
use issue #79 lane/worktree governance for detailed isolation and reconciliation
